creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm going to need you to debug this further in your environment. 

Note that the default Perl is 5.12.4: 
$ ncftpls -l ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-9-stable/Latest/perl.tbz 
lrwxr-xr-x  1 1006  1006  24 Feb 22 16:13 perl.tbz -> ../All/perl-5.12.4_4.tbz 

I'm am unable to destroy my entire system to upgrade from Perl 5.12 to 5.14 
at this time. 

Thanks.
